title: JSON Calendar File Format Schema
description: A JSON Schema for the modern .jsoncalendar file format proposal, focusing on events and core calendaring features.

Duration.title: Duration
Duration.description: A structured representation of an ISO 8601 duration. At least one property is required.

until.description: A date-time indicating when the recurrence ends.

bySecond.description: Optional array specifying the seconds for recurrence (0-59).

byMinute.description: Optional array specifying the minutes for recurrence (0-59).

byHour.description: Optional array specifying the hours for recurrence (0-23).

byDay.description: Optional array specifying the days of the week for recurrence. Items can be simple weekday abbreviations (MO, TU, etc.) or ordinal day strings like '1MO' or '-1SU'.

byMonthDay.description: Optional array specifying the days of the month for recurrence (1-31 or -31 to -1, zero is not allowed).

byYearDay.description: Optional array specifying the days of the year for recurrence (-366 to -1 or 1 to 366, zero is not allowed).

byWeekNumber.description: Optional array specifying the week numbers for recurrence (-53 to -1 or 1 to 53, zero is not allowed).

byMonth.description: Optional array specifying the months for recurrence (1-12).

bySetPosition.description: Optional array specifying the nth occurrence within the set of recurrence instances.

weekStart.description: Optional week start day for the recurrence (defaults to MO if not provided).

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification or reminder for an event.

oneOf.description: An absolute date-time when the notification should trigger.

trigger.description: Either a structured duration object representing a relative trigger or an absolute date-time string.

message.description: The message to be displayed or sent with the notification.

Location.title: Location
Location.description: A structured representation of the event location.

name.description: Name or title of the location.

address.description: The physical address of the location.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

mapUrl.description: An optional URL for a map service (e.g., Google Maps, Apple Maps) to view the location.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: A calendar event with all relevant properties.

uid.description: A globally unique identifier for the event.

summary.description: A short title or summary for the event.

description.description: A detailed description of the event. (UTF-8 encoded; no legacy escaping or folding needed.)

start.description: The event start date and time in ISO 8601 format, including the timezone offset (e.g., '2024-03-10T10:00:00-05:00')

end.description: The event end date and time in ISO 8601 format, including the timezone offset (e.g., '2024-03-10T10:00:00-05:00')

notifications.description: Optional notifications or reminders for the event.

created.description: An ISO 8601 date-time indicating when the event was created.

lastModified.description: An ISO 8601 date-time indicating when the event was last modified.

url.description: A URL linking to more detailed information about the event.

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.description: A calendar with its associated metadata and events.

timezone.description: This field is crucial for accurate event scheduling and should adhere to the IANA time zone database

name.description: An optional human-readable name for the calendar.

description.description: An optional description for the calendar.

version.description: The version of the jCal format.

productIdentifier.description: An optional identifier for the application or system that last modified the file
